contents.text: Vanilla gameplay has been changed with breaking and placing blocks being locked.

contents:
Hold whilst not moving to charge. Having a full charge will be signaled. Charge can perform differently depending on the action

Charged Sprint: Move whilst charging to perform a Charged Sprint which will give a movement speed boost that gradually decreases. Sneak to double the charge loss.

Charged Jump: Jump whilst charging to perform a Charged Jump which increases jump strength at the cost of all the charge getting used up.

Charge Stop: Let go of the sprint key whilst in the middle of charging to not perform any action and to reset the player's current charge.
